rulings.Case Title: STEVEN FONTANA SR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered Against Associated Insulation Of California Inc
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for September 28, 2016, Wednesday, in Department 503, Line 1. Fireman's Fund Insurance Company's motion to set aside default judgment is granted. Fireman's Fund is allowed to bring said motion. (See Western Heritage Ins. Co. v. Superior Court (2011) 199 Cal.App.4th 1196.) The default judgment entered against defendant Associated Insulation of California on March 5, 2015 is set aside pursuant to the court's inherent, equitable power to set aside a default on the ground of extrinsic fraud or mistake. A hearing is required on Fireman's Fund's motion to set aside the amended entry of default entered against defendant Associated Insulation of California on March 20, 2012. Plaintiff's request for a continuance is denied. The hearing will be at 9:30a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. = (503/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD POBLITZ et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for September 28, 2016, Wednesday, in Department 503, Line 5. Defendant Frederick Meiswinkel, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/GLW)
